pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: Strider 7+ at +109 was identified as the cleanest threshold edge on the board. The thesis relied on Strider's normal whiff engine, median projection near 8, and Pittsburgh K pockets. The model intentionally avoided 8+ ladder exposure pregame.

pitch_notes.four_seam_fastball: 36 pitches, 1 K, 94.8 mph avg, 0 whiffs on 20 swings, 11% CSW. Primary failure point; fastball did not miss bats.
pitch_notes.slider: 21 pitches, 1 K, 15% whiffs on swings, 10% CSW. Slider lacked normal chase/finish profile and averaged 1.0 mph below year average.
pitch_notes.changeup: 16 pitches, 0 K, 33% whiff on swings but only 19% CSW. Not enough volume or strike quality to rescue the K path.
pitch_notes.curveball: 11 pitches, 1 K, 50% whiff on swings, 27% CSW. Best small-sample bat-missing pitch but not used enough to drive the ticket.

what_failed: Strider produced only 3 strikeouts across 5.0 innings despite a median projection near 8.
Overall CSW collapsed to 14%, far below the 31%+ green-zone requirement.
Overall whiff rate was only 14% on swings, also far below the K-over threshold.
The four-seam fastball generated zero whiffs on 20 swings and only 11% CSW.
Slider averaged 83.3 mph, down 1.0 mph from year average, and produced only 10% CSW.
First-pitch strike rate was only 38%, creating count leverage issues and limiting putaway sequences.
The model over-weighted season-level Strider K reputation and under-weighted day-of stuff/command risk.
what_was_correct: The model correctly avoided the 8+ ladder, which would have increased loss exposure.
Pittsburgh did not need to suppress innings dramatically; the miss was driven by whiff collapse and pitch execution, not a short leash alone.
Pregame price showed theoretical edge, but the live indicators invalidated the thesis early.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: Add STRIDER_VOLATILITY_GATE: when Strider is priced as a primary position, require either confirmed recent CSW/whiff form or reduce stake size if his fastball/slider velocity trend is down. Add live kill-switch if through 2 innings CSW < 24%, first-pitch strike < 50%, or fastball whiff rate is near zero.

notes: This was a full process miss on the primary position. The failure was not caused by leash collapse; he threw 84 pitches and reached 5.0 innings. The failure was a bat-missing collapse, led by a four-seam fastball with zero whiffs and an overall 14% CSW.
